allow: Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\('@prisma/client'\); const prisma = new PrismaClient\(\); prisma.user.findFirst\({ where: { role: 'MEMBER' }, select: { email: true } }\).then\(user => { console.log\(user.email\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(err => { console.error\(err\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
